title: The BEST AI for 4K images. Free & fast
summary: Nvidia's Pixel Diffusion (PiD) is an open-source AI model designed for high-resolution 4K image generation. The video demonstrates its performance on text-to-image and image-upscaling workflows, comparing it against alternatives like SeedVR2.
